dismissalText.commentary: Pathum Nissanka st †Raghuvanshi b Roy 50 (29b 5x4 3x6 48m) SR: 172.41

dismissalComment.html: Action replay... goes wrong, and Nissanka walks back. Sent upstairs, not sure if it was needed. Ultra-Edge also being checked. No edge. Miles out. That's a couple of minutes wasted. Nissanka danced down, looking it to slap it through extra cover again. Anukul likely saw him and went much shorter and slower, landed in line with the tramline around a back of length. Nissanka cut hard, found thin air as the ball spun away and bounced nicely. Will be wide but out

dismissalText.commentary: Ajinkya Rahane run out (Starc) 13 (9b 1x4 1x6 13m) SR: 144.44

dismissalComment.html: run out at the non-striker's end! Drama in Delhi. Starc is pumped even as Allen apologises to his partner. Starc goes for the Inswinging yorker, Allen slams it back because it's not really in the block hole, Rahane is a couple of steps out and Starc gets his left hand on the ball which hits the stumps at the other end
